0.description: Byron phase. Mirrors mainnet/byron-genesis.json. Content deviations: (1) avvmDistr empty -- mainnet has 14505 ICO addresses, testnets seed funds via cardano-cli instead; (2) bootStakeholders, heavyDelegation and nonAvvmBalances absent -- dataset fields supplied by the workbench dataset cache (nix/workbench/genesis).

208.description: Shelley era (protocol version 2.0). Mirrors mainnet/shelley-genesis.json. Content deviations: (1) initialFunds empty -- mainnet seeds Shelley funds, testnets get them from cardano-cli's create-testnet-data dataset; (2) staking absent -- dataset field supplied by the workbench dataset cache (cardano-cli create-testnet-data output).

259.description: Extra entropy injection (one-shot: mixed into the next epoch's nonce, then reset at epoch 260)

260.description: Extra entropy reset to NeutralNonce after the one-epoch injection at 259

306.description: First block size bump + first per-tx exUnitsMem bump

319.description: Block size and per-tx exUnitsMem bump
